This contract never moves tokens or stock; it is purely observational         except for the event log it maintains.","kind":"dev","methods":{"getGlobalEventSlice(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"_from":"Start index in allEventIds[].","_to":"End index in allEventIds[] (inclusive, clamped)."}},"getHistorySlice(string,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"_from":"Start index (0-based, inclusive).","_to":"End index (inclusive). If _to >= array length, clamps to last."}},"recordEvent(string,address,string,uint256,string)":{"params":{"_action":"String label (must match EventType \u2014 see _parseEventType).","_actor":"The address that triggered the action.","_batchNumber":"The batch involved.","_note":"Optional delivery / prescription note.","_quantity":"Units involved. 0 for non-stock events."}},"registerFingerprint(string,bytes32)":{"params":{"_batchNumber":"The batch to fingerprint.","_dataHash":"keccak256 hash of core batch fields."}}},"stateVariables":{"actorEvents":{"details":"Per-actor event index: actor address \u2192 eventIds[]"},"allEventIds":{"details":"All event IDs ever (for full system audit)"},"authorisedCallers":{"details":"Authorised callers that may push events (TransferContract)."},"batchEvents":{"details":"Per-batch event log: batchNumber \u2192 TraceEvent[]"},"eventById":{"details":"Global event index: eventId \u2192 TraceEvent (for admin global queries)"},"fingerprints":{"details":"Per-batch originality fingerprint"},"nextEventId":{"details":"Global event counter"}},"title":"TraceContract","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"annotate(string,string)":{"notice":"Admin can attach an on-chain note to any batch         (e.g. \"Inspection passed\", \"Quality alert\", \"Under investigation\")."},"getAnnotations(string)":{"notice":"Returns all admin annotations on a batch."},"getCustodyChain(string)":{"notice":"Returns the full ordered custody chain from TransferContract.         Each entry shows who held the batch and when."},"getCustodyTimeline(string)":{"notice":"Returns a human-readable summary of each custody step,         enriched with role and license data from RegistryContract.         Ideal for the buyer's \"journey\" card view."},"getEventById(uint256)":{"notice":"Returns a single event by its global ID."},"getEventCount(string)":{"notice":"Returns the total number of events recorded for a batch."},"getEventsByActor(address)":{"notice":"Returns all events triggered by a specific actor address."},"getEventsForHolder(string,address)":{"notice":"Returns events relevant to a specific node (role dashboard).         Filters the batch event log to only events where actor == _holder."},"getFingerprint(string)":{"notice":"Returns the full fingerprint record for a batch."},"getFullHistory(string)":{"notice":"Returns the complete ordered event log for a batch.         Used by all role dashboards to show the \"trace timeline\"."},"getGlobalEventSlice(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Returns a batch of global events by IDs (admin audit log)."},"getHistoryByType(string,uint8)":{"notice":"Returns events filtered by EventType (e.g. only transfers)."},"getHistorySlice(string,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Returns a slice of events for pagination."},"getStockOf(string,address)":{"notice":"Returns the current stock quantity for a holder across a batch.         Thin wrapper \u2014 delegates to ProductContract."},"getTotalEventCount()":{"notice":"Returns the total number of events in the whole system."},"recordEvent(string,address,string,uint256,string)":{"notice":"Record a supply-chain event.         Called by TransferContract on every accepted transfer and sale."},"registerFingerprint(string,bytes32)":{"notice":"Manufacturer registers a cryptographic fingerprint of a batch         at the time of creation. Used later by buyers to verify originality.         The hash should be computed OFF-CHAIN as:         keccak256(abi.encodePacked(             batchNumber, productName, genericName, strength,             manufacturerAddr, mfgDate, expiryDate, totalQuantity         ))         and then passed here. This way the data is verifiable without         storing all fields again on-chain."},"setAuthorisedCaller(address,bool)":{"notice":"Grant or revoke event-recording permission for a contract."},"verifyEventIntegrity(uint256)":{"notice":"Re-computes a stored event's hash and compares it to         what is stored. Returns false if anyone tampered with         the struct after recording (should never happen in Solidity,         but useful as a defensive audit tool on a test chain)."},"verifyFingerprint(string,bytes32)":{"notice":"Buyer supplies the hash they computed from the medicine packaging.         Returns true if it matches the on-chain fingerprint exactly.         This is the tamper / counterfeit detection call."},"verifyProduct(string)":{"notice":"The primary buyer-facing function. Given a batch number         (typed or scanned via QR), returns a complete VerificationResult         struct with all the information needed to confirm:           1. The product exists on-chain.           2. It matches the manufacturer's registered fingerprint.           3. It has not expired or been recalled.           4. Where it currently is in the supply chain.           5. How many times it changed hands."}},"notice":"The read/audit layer of the medicine supply chain.         Records every on-chain event (called by TransferContract),         stores product hash fingerprints for originality checks,         and exposes rich query functions for every dashboard and         the public Buyer verification page.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"project:/contracts/TraceContract.sol":"TraceContract"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":1},"remappings":[],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"project:/contracts/IProduct.sol":{"keccak256":"0x5ae03bdfd7b5f1218a82454919cfe17dc7123464593fa75d2f8e1c1223b1c90b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6f93eceb46fc637456655672f6d4bb8e86e003cf832820467763964c7b67817b","dweb:/ipfs/QmXTdv5wSpfXGXtwW39ZK7kYmXn3L7XLs5sBEkJT85mghp"]},"project:/contracts/IRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe55cdc96665212b52f5a037443726a69213c2e0c207bb82f1216106ac9fc5cab","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://e174d386167631b76138ecc46922b7b553bea25dd8a0c8c7361725413a5a0bdf","dweb:/ipfs/QmWLFJUmCHxjNdJ4NiFKqoeYN1L28dkn5tzauzqiMe8hZg"]},"project:/contracts/TraceContract.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa71727618ee2665de6ea9d223ea437a236b31669bc2fcd1038c2d4e1c7f3ded3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1e1a2215faae1318f5aaabe5fc299ab6089c7e0ca5814c90477d86834a2b78d3","dweb:/ipfs/QmXMvk9bQ7vrHXmjbzBt1n3GAX5A7V7YAUsNjKoQyyVf2f"]}},"version":1}

documentation.text:
@dev High-level category tag stored alongside every TraceEvent.
      Lets the frontend filter events by type without string parsing.
@dev Authorised callers that may push events (TransferContract).

@dev All event IDs ever (for full system audit)
@dev Per-actor event index: actor address → eventIds[]
@dev Per-batch originality fingerprint
@dev Alert log: admin can annotate any batch with a note

documentation.text:
@notice The primary buyer-facing function. Given a batch number
         (typed or scanned via QR), returns a complete VerificationResult
         struct with all the information needed to confirm:
           1. The product exists on-chain.
           2. It matches the manufacturer's registered fingerprint.
           3. It has not expired or been recalled.
           4. Where it currently is in the supply chain.
           5. How many times it changed hands.

@notice Re-computes a stored event's hash and compares it to
         what is stored. Returns false if anyone tampered with
         the struct after recording (should never happen in Solidity,
         but useful as a defensive audit tool on a test chain).

documentation.text:
@dev Records an event internally (not via TransferContract).
      Used for fingerprint registration and admin annotations.

@dev Maps the action string from TransferContract to an EventType enum.
      Any unrecognised string falls through to EventType.Custom.
@dev Converts a Role enum to a human-readable string for the timeline.

devdoc.details: Write path  : only TransferContract (authorised caller) can push events.         Read path   : anyone — no role restriction on view functions.         This contract never moves tokens or stock; it is purely observational         except for the event log it maintains.

params._to: End index (inclusive). If _to >= array length, clamps to last.

params._actor: The address that triggered the action.

params._dataHash: keccak256 hash of core batch fields.

getAnnotations(string).notice: Returns all admin annotations on a batch.

getCustodyChain(string).notice: Returns the full ordered custody chain from TransferContract.         Each entry shows who held the batch and when.

getCustodyTimeline(string).notice: Returns a human-readable summary of each custody step,         enriched with role and license data from RegistryContract.         Ideal for the buyer's "journey" card view.

getEventById(uint256).notice: Returns a single event by its global ID.

getEventCount(string).notice: Returns the total number of events recorded for a batch.

getEventsByActor(address).notice: Returns all events triggered by a specific actor address.

getEventsForHolder(string,address).notice: Returns events relevant to a specific node (role dashboard).         Filters the batch event log to only events where actor == _holder.

getFingerprint(string).notice: Returns the full fingerprint record for a batch.

getFullHistory(string).notice: Returns the complete ordered event log for a batch.         Used by all role dashboards to show the "trace timeline".

getGlobalEventSlice(uint256,uint256).notice: Returns a batch of global events by IDs (admin audit log).

getHistoryByType(string,uint8).notice: Returns events filtered by EventType (e.g. only transfers).

getHistorySlice(string,uint256,uint256).notice: Returns a slice of events for pagination.

getStockOf(string,address).notice: Returns the current stock quantity for a holder across a batch.         Thin wrapper — delegates to ProductContract.

getTotalEventCount().notice: Returns the total number of events in the whole system.

recordEvent(string,address,string,uint25.notice: Record a supply-chain event.         Called by TransferContract on every accepted transfer and sale.

registerFingerprint(string,bytes32).notice: Manufacturer registers a cryptographic fingerprint of a batch         at the time of creation. Used later by buyers to verify originality.         The hash should be computed OFF-CHAIN as:         keccak256(abi.encodePacked(             batchNumber, productName, genericName, strength,             manufacturerAddr, mfgDate, expiryDate, totalQuantity         ))         and then passed here. This way the data is verifiable without         storing all fields again on-chain.

setAuthorisedCaller(address,bool).notice: Grant or revoke event-recording permission for a contract.

verifyEventIntegrity(uint256).notice: Re-computes a stored event's hash and compares it to         what is stored. Returns false if anyone tampered with         the struct after recording (should never happen in Solidity,         but useful as a defensive audit tool on a test chain).

verifyFingerprint(string,bytes32).notice: Buyer supplies the hash they computed from the medicine packaging.         Returns true if it matches the on-chain fingerprint exactly.         This is the tamper / counterfeit detection call.

verifyProduct(string).notice: The primary buyer-facing function. Given a batch number         (typed or scanned via QR), returns a complete VerificationResult         struct with all the information needed to confirm:           1. The product exists on-chain.           2. It matches the manufacturer's registered fingerprint.           3. It has not expired or been recalled.           4. Where it currently is in the supply chain.           5. How many times it changed hands.

userdoc.notice: The read/audit layer of the medicine supply chain.         Records every on-chain event (called by TransferContract),         stores product hash fingerprints for originality checks,         and exposes rich query functions for every dashboard and         the public Buyer verification page.
